stories.title: AMD’s new X100 chip lineup puts Strix Halo into robots – APUs for physical AI bring Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores to compete with Intel’s Panther Lake

sources.title: AMD’s new X100 chip lineup puts Strix Halo into robots – APUs for physical AI bring Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores to compete with Intel’s Panther Lake
sources.title_en: AMD’s new X100 chip lineup puts Strix Halo into robots – APUs for physical AI bring Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores to compete with Intel’s Panther Lake
sources.title_original: AMD’s new X100 chip lineup puts Strix Halo into robots – APUs for physical AI bring Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores to compete with Intel’s Panther Lake
sources.summary: Countering Intel’s recent moves, AMD is bringing its Strix Halo APUs to the realm of robots, and physical AI. Designed for 24/7 operation and a 10-year embedded lifecycle, X100 will also be offered as a Kria System on Module (SOM) robot developer platform.
sources.summary_zh: 为了对抗英特尔最近的举措，AMD 正在将其 Strix Halo APU 引入机器人和物理人工智能领域。 X100 专为 24/7 运行和 10 年嵌入式生命周期而设计，还将作为 Kria 系统模块 (SOM) 机器人开发平台提供。

stories.title: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%

sources.title: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
sources.title_en: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
sources.title_original: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
sources.summary: GM CFO Paul Jacobson says that the company's costs are expected to increase by $1.5 to $2 billion, primarily due to increasing memory chip costs. The move comes as the RAM shortage is affecting the automotive industry, right as cars are requiring more memory and storage due to infotainment and ADAS features.
sources.summary_zh: 通用汽车首席财务官Paul Jacobson表示，公司成本预计将增加1.5至20亿美元，主要是由于内存芯片成本增加。此举出台之际，RAM 短缺正在影响汽车行业，而汽车由于信息娱乐和 ADAS 功能而需要更多的内存和存储空间。

stories.title: Kill switches for most powerful AI models proposed by Bipartisan bill — DHS could order throttling or full shutdown, with fines up to $20 million per day

sources.title: Kill switches for most powerful AI models proposed by Bipartisan bill — DHS could order throttling or full shutdown, with fines up to $20 million per day
sources.title_en: Kill switches for most powerful AI models proposed by Bipartisan bill — DHS could order throttling or full shutdown, with fines up to $20 million per day
sources.title_original: Kill switches for most powerful AI models proposed by Bipartisan bill — DHS could order throttling or full shutdown, with fines up to $20 million per day
sources.summary: The bill amends the Homeland Security Act and covers companies earning at least $500 million in annual revenue from a model trained with compute costing more than $100 million.
sources.summary_zh: 该法案修订了《国土安全法》，涵盖了通过花费超过 1 亿美元的计算训练的模型获得至少 5 亿美元年收入的公司。

stories.title: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连 / Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects

sources.title: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连 / Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
sources.title_zh: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连
sources.title_en: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
sources.title_original: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
sources.summary: With the limitations of copper looming, the industry is transitioning to photonic interconnects to scale data center capabilities. We spoke to experts such as Lightmatter chief executive Nick Harris about the new scale-out paradigm and the battle for control over emerging standards.
sources.summary_zh: 随着铜的局限性日益显现，该行业正在转向光子互连以扩展数据中心的能力。我们采访了 Lightmatter 首席执行官尼克·哈里斯 (Nick Harris) 等专家，讨论了新的横向扩展范式以及对新兴标准的控制权之争。

sources.title_original: Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
sources.summary: The Arctic Senza AI 370 is a fanless mini PC designed to mount under your desk. Everyday performance isn’t held back by the lack of active cooling, and its soldered dual-channel 32GB LPDDR5X-8000 is appreciated during the RAM shortages. The meager front panel I/O is the only major drawback to the design.

stories.title: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'

sources.title: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.title_en: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.title_original: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.summary: Data center projects are facing increasing opposition from surrounding communities, making consent even far scarcer than the chips and power needed to run these facilities. Any developer planning to construct one must now consider the people living around the proposed site and take account for the months or years needed to approve it, if it even gets the green light.
sources.summary_zh: 数据中心项目面临着周边社区越来越多的反对，这使得同意比运行这些设施所需的芯片和电力更加稀缺。任何计划建造的开发商现在都必须考虑居住在拟议地点周围的人们，并考虑批准它所需的数月或数年，即使它获得了批准。

sources.summary: AMD is returning to 3D V-Cache in its data center range of CPUs with Venice-X, which it has confirmed will launch in the second half of 2027, with 1152 MB of L3 and clock speeds up to 5.15 GHz.
